params.name: Killer Diary Vol. 390
params.description: A secret manual exclusive to a one-thousand-year-old assassin family that records the previous generations' experience in the practice of assassination. The skills and techniques in the manual help assassins train more effectively. It is a treasure that most assassins are dying to obtain. But it's later found to be only the remnants.
